question.question: Look at the way the senator is avoiding the cameras; she {a1} a statement later under pressure.

source.name: Custom: Will vs Be Going To All Levels (B2)

tag.name: Will vs Be Going To All Levels

variants.text: Look at the way the senator is avoiding the cameras; she {a1} a statement later under pressure.

hints.hint:
Form: **be going to + base verb**.
We use **be going to** when there is a present sign, context, or visible evidence for a future event.
Example: *Look at the way the senator is avoiding the cameras; she is going to make a statement later under pressure.*

Forma: **be going to + czasownik w formie podstawowej**.
Używamy **be going to**, gdy istnieje obecny sygnał, kontekst albo widoczny dowód przyszłego wydarzenia.
Przykład: *Look at the way the senator is avoiding the cameras; she is going to make a statement later under pressure.*

Форма: **be going to + V1**.
Вживаємо **be going to**, коли є теперішній знак, контекст або видимий доказ майбутньої події.
Приклад: *Look at the way the senator is avoiding the cameras; she is going to make a statement later under pressure.*

chatgpt_explanations.question: Look at the way the senator is avoiding the cameras; she {a1} a statement later under pressure.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation:
✅ "is going to" is correct because there is a present sign, context, or visible evidence of the future event. Here we use **be going to**.
Example: *Look at the way the senator is avoiding the cameras; she is going to make a statement later under pressure.*

chatgpt_explanations.question: Look at the way the senator is avoiding the cameras; she {a1} a statement later under pressure.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation:
✅ "is going to" jest poprawne, bo istnieje obecny sygnał, kontekst albo widoczny dowód przyszłego wydarzenia. Tutaj używamy **be going to**.
Przykład: *Look at the way the senator is avoiding the cameras; she is going to make a statement later under pressure.*

Приклад: *Look at the way the senator is avoiding the cameras; she is going to make a statement later under pressure.*
